mapper.sql: id, nickname, username, `password`, salt, `status`, deleted, last_login_time, created_time, updated_time
mapper.insert: insert into user (id, nickname, username, `password`, salt, `status`, deleted, last_login_time, created_time, updated_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{deleted,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{lastLoginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into user
id,
nickname,
username,
`password`,
salt,
`status`, deleted,
last_login_time,
created_time,
updated_time,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{salt,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{deleted,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{lastLoginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update user
nickname = #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`password` = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
salt = #{salt,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
deleted = #{deleted,jdbcType=INTEGER},
last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
created_time = #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated_time = #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update user set nickname = #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `password` = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, salt = #{salt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, deleted = #{deleted,jdbcType=INTEGER}, last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, created_time = #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_time = #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
